zh.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales: 威爾士蒙姆爾阿加文尼
zh.Woodbridge, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可伍德布里奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Hastings於1325年出生在英國素福爾可伍德布里奇時，她的父親John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings38歲，母親Juliana de Leybourne22歲。她於1372年之前與William de Ingoldesthorpe在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1371年12月12日享年46歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可。

zh-hans.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales: 威尔士蒙姆爾阿加文尼
zh-hans.Woodbridge, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可伍德布里奇
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Hastings于1325年出生在英国素福爾可伍德布里奇时，她的父亲John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings38岁，母亲Juliana de Leybourne22岁。她于1372年之前与William de Ingoldesthorpe在英国英格兰坎布利其爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1371年12月12日享年46岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Hastings was born in 1325, in Woodbridge, Suffolk, England, her father, John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings, was 38 and her mother, Juliana de Leybourne, was 22. She married William de Ingoldesthorpe before 1372, in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 12 December 1371, at the age of 46, and was buried in Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Hastings est née en 1325, à Woodbridge, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Juliana de Leybourne, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé William de Ingoldesthorpe avant 1372, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 12 décembre 1371, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Hastings 1325 in Woodbridge, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings 38 und ihre Mutter Juliana de Leybourne 22. Sie hat vor 1372 in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom William de Ingoldesthorpe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 12. Dezember 1371 im Alter von 46 Jahren und wurde in Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Hastings è nata il nel 1325 nel Woodbridge, Suffolk, England, sua padre, John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Juliana de Leybourne, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato William de Ingoldesthorpe prima del 1372, nel Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 12 dicembre 1371, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Hastingsが1325年にイギリススフォルクウッドブリッジで生まれた時，父John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastingsは38歳，母Juliana de Leybourneは22歳であった。1372年以前にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアでWilliam de Ingoldesthorpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1371年12月12日に46歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Hastings(이)가 1325년 영국 수폴크 우드브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Juliana de Leybourne(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1372년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르에서 William de Ingoldesthorpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1371년 12월 12일 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Hastings nasceu em 1325, em Woodbridge, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Juliana de Leybourne, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Ingoldesthorpe antes 1372, em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 12 de dezembro de 1371, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Hastings родилась в 1325 г. в местности вудбридж, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Juliana de Leybourne, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Ingoldesthorpe перед 1372 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 12 декабря 1371 г. в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Hastings nació en 1325, en Woodbridge, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Juliana de Leybourne, tenía 22 años. Se casó con William de Ingoldesthorpe antes de 1372, en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 12 de diciembre de 1371, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Norfolk, Inglaterra.
